notes: As noted in another report, this isn't actually run in proton.  The developer has a Linux native port that just isn't advertised on the page.  The native version works without issues.

notes: Game works native on Linux. On Proton it works out of the box too with DXVK, good performance with this DX11 to Vulkan translation even in 4k.
